mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.purchase_price AS salePrice, p.purchase_unit AS saleUnit, p.unit, p.spec FROM product p WHERE p.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND p.is_active = 1

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.purchase_price AS salePrice, p.purchase_unit AS saleUnit, p.unit, p.spec FROM product p WHERE p.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND p.is_active = 1 AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.purchase_price AS salePrice, p.purchase_unit AS saleUnit, p.unit, p.spec FROM product p WHERE p.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND p.is_active = 1 AND p.code = #{code}

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.code, p.purchase_price AS salePrice, p.purchase_unit AS saleUnit, p.unit, p.spec FROM product p WHERE p.supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND p.is_active = 1 AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND p.code = #{code}
